title: BlackSky Technology Inc (BKSY) Q3 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Expect
text: BlackSky is scheduled to report Q3 2024 results on November 7, 2024. The consensus forecasts indicate Q3 2024 Revenue: $27.48 million, Q3 2024 EPS: -$0.65 per share, Full Year 2024 Revenue: $108.13 million, Full Year 2024 EPS: -$2.44 per share. Over the past 90 days, analyst expectations have shifted modestly. Full-year 2024 revenue estimates declined slightly from $108.68 million to $108.13 million, while 2025 projections fell from $138.15 million to $135.75 million. However, profitability expectations improved, with 2024 EPS estimates moving from -$2.79 to -$2.44 and 2025 estimates improving from -$1.77 to -$1.62. In Q2 2024, BlackSky reported revenue of $24.94 million, missing analyst expectations by 1.71%. The company beat earnings estimates significantly, reporting -$0.48 per share versus -$0.77 expected—a 37.34% beat. The stock surged 13.65% following that announcement. Six analysts provide price targets averaging $17.33, suggesting 140.74% upside from the current $7.20 price. The consensus brokerage rating is "Outperform," with GuruFocus estimating a GF Value of $24.25.
